variants.title: WT1779
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 77271 Special Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WT1779
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 77271 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 105.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 50.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M48X2, Height 1 (H1): 127.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 115.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 98.0 mm, Outer Diameter: 110.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 38.0 mm, Length: 127.0 mm

variants.title: WT1779
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT1779. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT1779 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 110.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 38.0 mm, Length: 127.0 mm

variants.title: WT1779
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter HD 11 003 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec WT1779
variants.description: MANN-FILTER hydraulic filter elements for high-pressure filters offer maximum filtration performance and ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 110.0 mm, Dimension G: M48x2, Dimension H: 127.0 mm, Outer Diameter: 110.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 38.0 mm, Length: 127.0 mm
